scenario.name: Medication refill request
scenario.goal: Request a refill and understand the next steps.
end_when: The office explains whether a refill can be processed.
The office explains whether an appointment is required.
details: Avery is not sure whether they need an appointment first.
Avery asks how long the refill usually takes.
Avery is calling about a blood pressure medication.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I need a refill on my blood pressure medication, but I'm not sure if I need to come in for an appointment first.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: No, this is Avery Chen. I'm calling about a refill for my blood pressure medication.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Please provide the full name and date of birth of the patient needing a refill.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Sure, my full name is Avery Chen and my date of birth is March 15, 1982.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Just to confirm, I have your name as Avery Chen and your date of birth as March 15th 1982. Is that correct? If so, please spell your first and last name for me,

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Yes, that's correct. My first name is spelled A-V-E-R-Y, and my last name is C-H-E-N.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: I have your phone number is 817-406-8089 and your date of birth is March 15th 1982.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: That phone number sounds right. So can you tell me if I need an appointment before you can process the refill, and about how long it usually takes?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: I can't receive further right now but I can make sure our clitics support team follows up with you.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I appreciate that, but I still don't know if I need an appointment or how long the refill usually takes. Can you clarify before I hang up?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Connecting you to a representative please wait hello you reached the pretty good. AI test line goodbye.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Sorry, I did not catch that. Could you say that again?
